<img src="assets/iframeplayer.clip.gif" alt="Iframe Player Walkthrough" width="100%">

<div align="center">
  <p><i>A smart, responsive media player component that automatically applies optimized styling and embed logic for various social media platforms.</i></p>
</div>

---

## 📌 Introduction & Overview

**Iframe Player** is a highly reusable, responsive media player component designed to embed and display content from various social media platforms inside Datacore. It intelligently applies platform-specific styling constraints (aspect ratios, scales, offsets, dimensions) based on the source URL, creating a polished native-like viewing experience for YouTube (Standard & Shorts), Instagram (Reels & Posts), TikTok, X, Snapchat, Warpcast, Facebook, and Vimeo.

---

## ✨ Features

### 📦 Reusable & Prop-Driven
* Pass a dynamic `initialUrl` prop to standardise media playback across multiple layouts, notes, and views.

### 🎛️ Platform-Specific Iframe Guidelines
* Pre-configured sizing, scaling, and offset parameters for major social networks, tailoring content rendering to mobile aspect ratios where appropriate.

### 🛡️ Responsive Scaling & Resize Observers
* Automatically rescales and repositions the active iframe using a `ResizeObserver` layout listener to prevent media cropping during viewport transitions.

### 🌐 Smart URL Transformation
* Seamlessly converts standard YouTube link variants into privacy-friendly `youtube-nocookie.com` embed paths.

### 🚀 Playback Fallback Handler
* Automatically detects when app protocol security limits standard frame loads (e.g., YouTube's "Error 153" within desktop client envelopes) and renders a convenient one-click "Open in Browser" button to bypass limitations.

---

## 📦 Directory Index & Components

The package exposes the following compiled files:

| File | Description |
| :--- | :--- |
| **[IFRAME PLAYER.md](IFRAME%20PLAYER.md)** | The main entry point configured with declarative frontmatter. |
| **[src/index.jsx](src/index.jsx)** | The dynamic bootstrapper script that loads the application interface. |
| **[src/App.jsx](src/App.jsx)** | The core UI orchestrator and dashboard sandbox demo space. |
| **[src/components/IframePlayer.jsx](src/components/IframePlayer.jsx)** | Player module containing responsive logic, hooks, and guidelines. |
| **[src/components/FileSectionsProvider.jsx](src/components/FileSectionsProvider.jsx)** | Manages markdown note section parsing and inline editing UI. |
| **[METADATA.md](METADATA.md)** | YAML taxonomy manifest mapping component settings, compatibility, and target. |
| **[CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md)** | Engineering standards and contributor guidelines. |
| **[LICENSE.md](LICENSE.md)** | The MIT permissible software distribution license. |
| **[assets/iframeplayer.clip.gif](assets/iframeplayer.clip.gif)** | Optimised loop animation demonstrating player scaling presets. |
| **[assets/iframe_player.webp](assets/iframe_player.webp)** | Standard components preview image. |

---

## Contributors

- **beto.group** — Core architecture and responsive media player guidelines.
